programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens intercept video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack Earth, using the games as models. Knowing that he must employ a similar strategy, President Will Cooper (Kevin James) recruits his childhood pal, former video-game champ and home-theater installer Sam Brenner (Adam Sandler), to lead a team of old-school arcade players and a military specialist (Michelle Monaghan) in an all-out battle to save the planet.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Unlike their heroic counterparts on the force, desk-bound NYPD detectives Gamble and Hoitz garner no headlines as they work day to day. Gamble relishes his job as a paper pusher, but Hoitz is itching to get back on the street and make a name for himself. When a seemingly minor case turns out to be a big deal, the two cops get the opportunity to finally prove to their comrades that they have the right stuff.

programme.title: We're the Millers
programme.desc: Small-time pot dealer David learns the hard way that no good deed goes unpunished; trying to help some teens, he is jumped by thugs and loses his cash and stash. Now, David's in big debt to his supplier and to wipe the slate clean, he must go to Mexico to pick up the guy's latest shipment. To accomplish his mission, Dave devises a foolproof plan: He packs a fake family into a huge RV and heads south of the border for a wild weekend that is sure to end with a bang.

programme.title: Reel Inspiration

programme.title: Extraordinary
programme.desc: Following open-heart surgery, a marathon runner believes he has to hang up his running shoes for good. Instead, he feels called upon by God to inspire people one last time and sets off on a 2,900-mile race across America.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A young man consumed with bitterness after heartbreak must relearn how to open himself up to love.

programme.title: Princess Cut 2: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Robert and Lauren Anderson are finally pregnant after years of trying to start a family, but Lauren is concerned that she won't be able to maintain her boutique business and be a good mother.

programme.title: Betting on the Bride
programme.desc: A womanizer bets that he can get someone to accept his marriage proposal after dating him for just 30 days. What he doesn't know is that the woman he has targeted has some serious commitment issues.

programme.title: God's Country Song
programme.desc: A charming but troubled country singer learns he has a 5-year-old son that he didn't know existed. Struggling with alcohol addiction, he must now decide whether to raise the boy or leave his family behind to pursue his dream of musical stardom.

programme.title: The World We Make
programme.desc: An 18-year-old equestrian and her boyfriend are almost ready to build a life together, but their relationship is tested when racial biases surface in their small town.

programme.title: Flowers and Honey
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a city florist and the owner of an apiary business after she inherits her great aunt's farmland.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Princess Cut 3: Beauty From Ashes
programme.desc: A down-on-her-luck waitress witnesses a domestic disturbance and develops an unexpected relationship with the policeman investigating the case.

programme.title: God's Not Dead: We the People
programme.desc: The Rev. Dave Hill defends a group of Christian home-schooling families after they receive an impromptu inspection from a progressive, local government official who doesn't like what she finds. Taken aback by her interference, Dave travels to Washington, D.C., to testify in a landmark congressional hearing that will determine the future of religious freedom in our country for years to come.

programme.title: Walking With Herb
programme.desc: Amid a crisis of faith, an amateur golfer receives a startling message from God on his computer screen.

programme.title: God's Not Dead: A Light in Darkness
programme.desc: The Rev. Dave Hill faces an unexpected setback when his beloved church burns down -- prompting the officials at the adjoining university to try and kick his congregation off campus. Battle lines are quickly drawn between the church and the community as the reverend now finds himself at odds with his longtime friend -- the president of the school. Facing a legal battle, Hill soon seeks help from his estranged brother -- a big-city lawyer and atheist -- in a fight to help rebuild the church.

programme.title: Betting on the Bride
programme.desc: A womanizer bets that he can get someone to accept his marriage proposal after dating him for just 30 days. What he doesn't know is that the woman he has targeted has some serious commitment issues.

programme.title: Learning to Love
programme.desc: Harry struggles to connect with his two daughters when they lose their faith after losing their mom. When they are faced with the prospect of a new nanny, they are pleasantly surprised by Steph, who floods their hearts with warmth and positivity.

programme.title: How to Train Your Husband
programme.desc: A successful marriage therapist and best-selling author suddenly realizes that she may not know how to fix her own marriage.

programme.title: An Unlikely Angel
programme.desc: Businesswoman Janie is falling apart at the thought of becoming a mom, then has a chance meeting with an angel.

programme.title: Faith, Hope & Love
programme.desc: A recent divorcee enters into a dance contest in a desperate attempt to save her struggling dance studio.

programme.title: Not Your Romeo & Juliet
programme.desc: With a popular romance column and a perfect boyfriend, college student Micki seems to have figured out love. However, when another student launches an anti-romance column, it's love and war as Micki sets out to take down her rival at any cost.

programme.title: Pardoned by Grace
programme.desc: Drug addict and alcoholic Scott Highberger overcomes his demons and finds religion. After serving time, he becomes a pastor and runs a successful prison ministry.

programme.title: The World We Make
programme.desc: An 18-year-old equestrian and her boyfriend are almost ready to build a life together, but their relationship is tested when racial biases surface in their small town.

programme.title: Beautiful One
programme.desc: A young woman who has always believed she is not pretty enough embarks on a journey to prove she is beautiful.

programme.title: Indivisible
programme.desc: Fresh out of the seminary and basic training, Army chaplain Darren Turner receives orders to deploy to Iraq, leaving his wife behind to care for their three young children. The harsh realities of war soon take their toll on Turner and his battalion, making it hard to stay connected to his beloved family. When Darren finally comes home, the Turners must decide if they're willing to face one more battle -- the fight to save their marriage.

programme.title: Champion
programme.desc: Dirt track racer Sean Weathers (Andrew Cheney) was at the top of his game with an unstoppable career. When a rivalry with another racer turns personal, the ego that propelled him to success causes a tragedy, sending his life into a tailspin. Jack Reed (Gary Graham) had prospered as a businessman but failed as a family man. In a sudden turn of events, his chances for reconciliation are ripped from his grasp. Initially, Barb eggs the caller on, but stops when he responds threateningly. Soon, Barb's friend Clare (Lynne Griffin) goes missing from the sorority house, and a local adolescent girl is murdered, leading the girls to suspect a serial killer is on the loose. But no one realizes just how near the culprit is.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Goomo cree que sus zapatos mágicos lo llevarán a tesoro cuando haya tomado 100,000 pasos con ellos, pero todos creen que Goomo se ha vuelto loco.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Mina crea unos inventos para ayudar a Bello,Goomo,Rita y Ongo rescatar a la princesa secuestrada.

programme.title: Leo, el explorador
programme.desc: Zari se encuentra con un hermoso pavo real cerca del parque infantil. Los guardabosques júnior intentan ayudarle a encontrar una pareja.

programme.title: Leo, el explorador
programme.desc: Mientras limpian la playa, Kyle descubre unos huevos de tortuga. Los exploradores júnior cuidan de las crías y les ayudan a llegar al mar.

programme.title: Leo, el explorador
programme.desc: Los exploradores júnior intentan curar a un camello herido en el desierto de Gobi y lo ayudan a reunirse con su caravana.

programme.title: Leo, el explorador
programme.desc: Kai pide a los exploradores júnior que le ayuden a grabar un video bajo el agua. Mientras filman, se encuentran con una estrella de mar.

programme.title: Leo, el explorador
programme.desc: Kyle descubre un animal extraño atrapado en una botella que flota en el mar, así que pide a los exploradores júnior que lo ayuden a liberarlo.

programme.title: Leo, el explorador
programme.desc: Zari atrapa por accidente a un pez payaso mientras construye un castillo de arena. Con la ayuda de los exploradores júnior, intenta devolverlo a su anémona, pero se encuentran con un depredador.

programme.title: Abecedario animal

programme.desc: ¡Flash ha avistado otra criatura que puede agregar a su Abecedario Animal! Esta vez se trata de una anémona.

programme.title: Abecedario animal
programme.desc: Flash ha avistado otra impresionante criatura para agregar a su abecedario animal: se trata de un hipocampo.

programme.title: Sonidos animales
programme.desc: Rocky, un león animatrónico, se embarca en una divertida actividad interactiva en la que intenta adivinar el animal correcto que corresponde a los sonidos que imitan los niños.

programme.title: Sonidos animales
programme.desc: Se analiza a los camellos y los sonidos que emiten.

programme.title: Cuentos Pop
programme.desc: Es hora de acompañar a Gorila Ninja en los Cuentos Pop y adivinar qué escultura está haciendo con los globos.

programme.title: Adivina el animal
programme.desc: Solo tres pistas para ayudar a Flash, Lemur, Afrina y sus amigos a adivinar el animal.

programme.desc: Flash, Lemur, Afrina y sus amigos sólo tienen tres pistas para adivinar el animal.

programme.title: Adivina el animal
programme.desc: Flash y sus amigos se ponen a prueba jugando a adivinar el nombre de los animales basándose en datos interesantes y en sus características físicas.

programme.desc: Una oportunidad para probar los conocimientos acerca de lo que comen los animales.

programme.desc: ¿Qué se conoce de los animales y sus ganas de divertirse?

programme.title: Estrellas Animales
programme.desc: Se va a poner frío el clima en Estrellas Animales. En Frío Extremo, se ven a los animales más lindos y curiosos de este clima.

programme.title: Estrellas Animales
programme.desc: Este tiempo está dedicado a aquellas criaturas a las que les encanta pasar el rato, chapotear, brincar o simplemente divertirse mucho, mucho, mucho.

programme.title: Estrellas Animales
programme.desc: Una gran oportunidad para retorcerse, deslizarse y no parar junto a los animales más locos y divertidos del reino animal.

programme.title: Estrellas Animales
programme.desc: Algunos animales son muy buenos para ocultarse y ni siquiera los mejores rastreadores pueden encontrarlos.

programme.desc: Rory el Tigre es el presentador y Latif, Dunia y Panda compiten para ver las cosas maravillosas y fantásticas que pueden hacer los animales.

programme.title: Estrellas Animales
programme.desc: Existen muchos tipos de cola: grande, pequeña, ondulada o ruidosa. Algunos animales tienen y otros no.

programme.desc: La gente se vuelve loca por los colores y lo mismo sucede con los animales; las preguntas de hoy son sobre los animales más coloridos del mundo.

programme.title: Estrellas Animales
programme.desc: Cada sonido, sea extraño, loco o grazniento, llenará el maravilloso mundo de los sonidos en este juego.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Goomo encuentra una caja de música heavy metal. A él le gusta pero pronto descubre que no a todos le gusta. Las personas tienen gustos diferentes y eso esta bien.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Cuando la Reina echa al Rey del palacio, Bello lo acoge y lo ayuda con su temor a la oscuridad.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Goomo despierta pensando que ha arruinado los árboles de Jellyberry cuando los descubre derribados, pero Mina y Bello descubren que fue el Rey quien lo hizo y deben responsabilizarlo por sus acciones.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Bello descubre de la forma más complicada el significado detrás de las palabras. Él se entromete con la más reciente creación de Mina, un robot gigante para cambiar los focos.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Bello y Goomo están decididos a resolver el misterio de quién está robando la fruta del jardín real.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Rita pierde a Princess y recorre desesperadamente el planeta Jammbo para encontrarla.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: La Reina sale de vacaciones y el Rey se queda a cargo de todas las responsabilidades por lo que busca a una persona que lo ayude.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Los chicos están contando historias escalofriantes durante un campamento; Goomo cuenta la historia más aterradoras acerca de un monstruo y luego va a buscar un bocadillo.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Tras cometer un error Bello se escuda en una historia muy poco verosímil. Mina, enfadada con él, le someterá a una dura prueba: "El Caramelo De La Verdad". Un caramelo que hace flotar a aquel que miente.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Mina intenta construir un columpio increíble para agradar al Rey. Ella pronto descubre que la tecnología no puede reemplazar a la amistad y cooperación.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: A Bello se le asigna un trabajo muy importante: ¡está a cargo de administrar Music Factory! Aunque la Reina deja el manual de instrucciones, Bello lo ignora. Tan pronto como ella se va a tomar un merecido descanso, toda la operación se vuelve loca.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Rita está cansada de perder en todos los juegos, por eso se alía con unos brazaletes que la ayudarán a ganar todos los juegos de los que participe.

programme.desc: Bello se molesta con la Reina cuando cree que ella quiere detener todas sus aventuras. Una noche él desea que la Reina se convierta en niña otra vez. Cuando su deseo se cumple el actúa como el hermano mayor de la Reina.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: La emoción de Goomo por su cumpleaños se evapora cuando despierta y descubre que su amado casco a desaparecido y ninguno de sus amigos aparentemente recuerda su día especial.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Ongo se lastima mientras juega y Bello decide mudarse con él hasta que se recupere. Juntos descubren que aun las cosas más pequeñas de la vida pueden ser divertidas e interesantes.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Cuando Rita intenta algunos experimentos en el laboratorio de Mina, ella pronto descubre que primero necesita aprender algunas lecciones básicas para evitar el desastre.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Bello descubre que su mejor amigo Goomo tiene talento para la música, Bello hace todo lo posible para mostrar al grupo el talento de su amigo.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Rita hace sus propios experimentos en el laboratorio de Mina; Goomo pierde sus lentes, pero cuando Dodo es encontrado usando las gafas y puede ver, Goomo debe decidir si tomar su gafas otra vez.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Rita desea que todo en Jammbo sea de su color favorito, rosa. Sin embargo, cuando todos comienzan a ponerse rosa es una carrera para cambiar a Jammbo a su estado previo antes que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Rita y Goomo descubren un huevo de Dodo e intentan mirar de cerca, pero cuando lo pierden deben recuperarlo rápidamente.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Cuando los Discos de Sonido se vuelven locos, Bello y Rita deben regresar cada sonido a su lugar apropiado.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm
programme.desc: Bello está molesto porque necesita llevar un parche, pero sus amigos le demostrarán que una canción puede convertirlo en una diversión.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: A chainsaw accident leaves the crew short-handed; Jason flips a loaded trailer; Shelby finds out if he filled his board foot order.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Washington, Rygaard goes deep into their roughest terrain yet in an attempt to recapture the title; in Alaska, Papac's dreams of a repeat are shattered when Coatsy's badly injured; in Canada, a new candidate steps into the ring.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Papac team struggles to find someone to fill the shoes of injured Coatsy; Gabe Rygaard and his crew scramble to make up for their slow start; In Wyoming, David Zitterkopf and Sons keep their chainsaws humming.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Alaska, Papac initiates an extremely dangerous process called Shotgun Logging; in Wyoming, the Zitterkopf men take the Bear Ranch site by storm; at Rygaard, the team doubles the yarders to increase production.

programme.desc: Shelby uses an airboat to search for century-old logs; Rygaard attempts to move a six-ton cypress; David's sons hold down the fort while he delivers a load of logs to the mill; the Dreadknots suffer a late-day accident.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby tries to repair his custom-made buggy; David Zitterkopf makes a dangerous swing between trees; the Dreadknots go logging in the night; Triack is at a disadvantage when a crew member is injured.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby goes to Lake Ponchartrain with Belinda and Bob to obtain a huge log he marked years ago; In Florida, it's round two for the Chapman and Gump log; things go from bad to worse for the bare bones Rygaard crew.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The Rygaards go old school to keep the team on track; Shelby and Bob find a valuable sinker cypress; the Zitterkopf crew tries to take on a dangerous tangle of logs known as "the teepee of death."

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In the Louisiana Bayou, Shelby Stanga's jet boat is in serious need of repair; in Washington, Gabe takes a risk and hires a wild card veteran logger; in Alaska, the Papac team is battling the elements mother nature is throwing their way.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga attempts to upgrade his logging empire, so he tries out some new equipment; DJ Jeremiah just may provide the spark the Rygaard has been missing; Triack's production is slowing down because of steep terrain and narrow logging roads.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Rygaard logging has started to claw its way back up the log count thanks to DJ Jeremiah, but today he's a no show; In Alaska they need to fill the seat in the yarder soon; Shelby Stanga is still without his Jetboat.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga still doesn't have his jet boat, but fortunately he has his trusty assistant Davi; the Papac crew is struggling to remain atop the King of the Mountain leaderboard, they're moving to the toughest section on their site.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby gets his jetboat back, and it now has a new engine that will help him get the job done; Rygaard is still struggling and Gabe is forced to promote his inexperienced crew, which could mean disaster.

programme.desc: Shelby realizes he may be short on wood for his log buyer, so he sends his troops out to hunt for some last minute logs; Zitterkopf and Sons lose their skidder a mechanical breakdown.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Alaska, the team gains a boost of energy as they get two valuable hands on the landing to up production; Gabe Rygaard has his old crew back in full force, but suffer another mechanical breakdown.

programme.title: El viajero con Josh Garcia

programme.title: El reino animal de Mutual of Omaha: Protegiendo la naturaleza
